name: Tuna Stuffed Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (5 oz each) Water-packed tuna, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup non-fat cottage cheese and 1/2 cup plain non-fat yogurt in a bowl.
2. Add 1/4 teaspoon dill weed and 1/8 teaspoon garlic powder; mix well.
3. In another bowl, combine drained tuna, remaining 1/2 cup cottage cheese, parsley, onion, lemon juice, and dill weed.
4. Stuff the manicotti shells with the tuna mixture.
5. Place the stuffed shells seam-side down in an 11x7-inch baking dish sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
6. Mix any leftover sauce ingredients and spoon over the manicotti.
7. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Serves 4, two shells each.
Nutritional information: 285 calories, 3 grams fat, 246 milligrams calcium.
